title: Adrenaline Totems
description: Replaces Totems of undying with Adrenaline.
body:
> # Adrenaline Totems!
> 
> ## Thats right!
> 
> ### Based off of the Phoenix SC video!
> link to the video here → https://youtu.be/JwaEjjHEFys?t=379
> 
> #### I have no clue what I'm doing!
> 
> But I do know this!
> 
> > Reasons this is cool
> 
> | Reason 1             | Reason 2               | Reason 3              |
> |---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
> | is cool            |  is cool              |  is cool             |
> |  is cool            |  is cool              |  is cool             |
> |  is cool            |  is cool              |  is cool             |
> |  is cool |  is cool |  is cool |


Please do note this is my first Resource pack! I will make more of these. Its really fun!
